policies.name: Standard credit load
policies.message: A term schedule of 15 credits or fewer is normally allowed.

policies.name: Credit overload approval
policies.message: Schedules above 15 credits require human advisor approval.

policies.name: Missing prerequisite
policies.message: A course with an unsatisfied prerequisite should not be recommended without advisor approval.

policies.name: Concurrent prerequisite risk
policies.message: If a prerequisite is still in progress, flag the risk that the student may need to drop the follow-on course if they do not pass.

policies.name: Waitlist course risk
policies.message: Waitlisted courses should be paired with a backup option.

policies.name: Closed course
policies.message: Closed courses should not be recommended unless an advisor or department grants an exception.

policies.name: Technical course balance
policies.message: More than two demanding technical courses may create workload risk.

policies.name: Academic standing restriction
policies.message: Students not in good academic standing need advisor approval for course planning changes.
